title: One right change allowed my portfolio to grow steadily, eventually reaching approximately $800k.
author: Sweaty_Pen4355
selftext:
.I didn't come here to show off; I simply want to help and share.Over time, my investment portfolio has steadily grown to approximately $800k.

What surprised me most was not the returns themselves, but rather the enhanced stability of the portfolio once I had simplified everything.

In the past, I often overcomplicated matters constantly shifting strategies and searching for better methods. In reality, however, this approach did more harm than good, ultimately hindering my execution.

My current approach is remarkably simple: I begin by analyzing a higher time frame (the 4-hour chart) to identify the trading range; I then wait for sufficient liquidity to enter the market; and finally, I execute a trade only after confirming that the market structure aligns with my criteria.

The true differentiator lies in consistently adhering to a specific setup one designed to selectively reduce the frequency of trades, rather than increasing it.

While this may not be a revolutionary innovation, for me personally, organizing all these steps into a repeatable framework has proven immensely valuable.

Over time, I have continued to refine and meticulously document my methodology, primarily to ensure consistency in my execution.

The key lies in the repetitive execution of the correct process. I have compiled my specific configuration settings into a dedicated folder, which I am sharing completely free of charge with anyone who might find it useful. Feel free to leave a comment below or contact me directly. Creating this configuration wasn't easy, so let's keep working on it!
